report.summary: Steady-state cycle: 554 published pages intact, 103 missing page.tsx files (pre-existing), 142 TS errors in 5 files (unchanged from prior cycle), 6/6 API routes structurally healthy with correct cache TTLs, 156 uncommitted files in working tree.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 554 published slugs in published-pages.ts — no change from prior cycle
103 published slugs missing page.tsx files (pre-existing: learn/, taxes/, wallets/, investing/best/, blog/ routes) — no new regressions

142 TypeScript errors across 5 files (unchanged): lido-v3-stvaults (94 errors), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4), institutional-crypto-adoption (2), crypto-index-funds (2), structured-data.examples.ts (40 — reference file only)
No new pages published or promoted since prior eod cycle
No publish queue file found (publish-queue.ts absent) — queue management may be inline or cleared
Local build cannot be verified (sandbox OOM on 554+ page static generation)

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes have route.ts files and compile: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified correct: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (variable/configurable)
All routes implement Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate pattern
market-dominance and prices routes have explicit fallback data on upstream failure
Health endpoint (/api/health) present with rate limiting — uses mock service checks, not live probes
Cannot test live API responses from sandbox — no rate-limit or stale-data anomalies detectable

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
156 uncommitted files in working tree (modified OG SVGs, learn pages, reports, globals.css)
No new commits or deploys since last cycle — working tree is accumulating changes
Standup noted 146 uncommitted files and a 2-day agent gap (Mar 26-27) — the uncommitted file count has grown to 156
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (network egress blocked)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: No new pages shipped this cycle vs prior eod — delta is zero
Carry-over from prior cycle: fix 4 learn pages with JSX escaping errors (lido-v3, crypto-arbitrage, institutional-adoption, crypto-index-funds)
Carry-over: commit and deploy the 156 uncommitted files — growing backlog since batch deploy
Carry-over: restore or rebuild publish-queue.ts for queue management workflow
BTC at ~$66.6K with Fear index 13-29 — market volatility may drive traffic to fear-greed and market-metrics tools
BLOCKER: 156 uncommitted files need Jefe to trigger a commit + deploy cycle to get changes live
